description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linux that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix job strategy to build on ubuntu-22.04 and ubuntu-24.04 environments. For each environment, check out the repository with a fetch depth of 2, install build dependencies, autogen, configure, and run make commands to build and test the project, including make distcheck, make install, and make check. Additionally, on ubuntu-22.04, run gcov, upload code coverage to Codecov, and upload a tarball artifact.
